name: Pushpad
description: Pushpad — web push notifications service for developers, with REST API, WordPress plugin, and unlimited subscribers on paid plans.

seo.title: Pushpad — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Pushpad: Pushpad — web push notifications service for developers, with REST API, WordPress plugin, and unlimited subscribers on paid plans.

when_to_use: Web push notifications with unlimited subscribers via REST API
WordPress plugin-based push notifications for content blogs
Developer-controlled web push with raw API access

pros: WordPress plugin covers common CMS cases
cons: Web push only — no mobile SDK
Small team and limited support hours
review.verdict: Minimalist web push API for devs who want to send, not manage campaigns — good fit for lean stacks.
review.best_for: Developers needing a no-frills web push API with flat pricing
review.not_for: Marketing teams wanting journeys and rich analytics

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
